3217080.name: Hope of Taru Soundtrack
3217080.description:
Enjoy the unique Soundtrack of "Hope of Taru", made by Seidel Games. For fans and supporters.

The platformer game "Hope of Taru" by Seidel Games was created in a family summer project 2024 and is completely free. However, if you liked the game and want to support us, this is the donation option for you.

The whole game music, created by our composer Lyra Arpa, comes as an mp3 sound file package, including the background tracks of all levels, indoor and outdoor versions, as well as the boss fight and the credits theme.

Thanks for playing our games and enjoying the music!

Your Seidel Games Team: Niramila, Lyra Arpa, Windmaedchen, Eridane and Yasu
